name: @opentabs-dev/opentabs-plugin-yahoo-auctions
description: OpenTabs plugin for Yahoo! Auctions Japan sourcing research

opentabs.description: Search Yahoo! Auctions Japan and inspect sourcing candidates

scripts.check: npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check
